name: Mr Tomato VS Zombies
description: Jealous zombies have kidnapped a group of tiny tomatoes! Launch Mr Tomato with a powerful slingshot and smash your way through challenging levels to rescue them all. Break obstacles, defeat enemies, and avoid dangerous traps as you aim each shot with precision. Use physics-based gameplay to your advantage and clear every stage with skill and timing. Free your tomato friends, overcome tricky obstacles, and complete this fast-paced arcade adventure full of action and fun!
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
tags: free html5 games for your website
